title:
Lesson 1:
It Doesn't Matter
description: 'No importa' = It doesn't matter / Never mind (casual, dismissing something). 'No es importante' = It's not important (more explanatory). Use 'no importa' to wave something off quickly.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: I arrived late. I'm very sorry.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.spanish: No importa. Todavía estamos esperando al resto.
dialogue.english: It doesn't matter. We're still waiting for the others.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: I also forgot to bring the documents.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.spanish: No es importante para hoy. Los traes la próxima vez.
dialogue.english: It's not important for today. Bring them next time.
